overview.description: The TrueShares Structured Outcome (February) ETF (FEBZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims for specific buffered losses on the S&P 500 over a specific holdings period with uncapped gains, subject to strategy costs. The actively managed fund holds options and collateral. FEBZ was launched on Jan 31, 2021 and is issued by Truemark Group.
